titleStmt.title: SII 20.27: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 27. (B.K. No. 55 of 1936-37.) KANNOḶḶI, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the left wall of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 962, Vikrama, Māgha, ba. 9, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1041, January 29.

It records a gift of land to Vāmaśaktipaṇḍita, for the worship of god Bhōgēśvara of Kaṇṇavaḷḷi by Mahāsāmanta Gōpālarasa who was administering Kaṇṇavaḷḷi. Mention is made of the neleviḍu of Poṭṭaḷakeṟe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithivī
vallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśva
raparamabhaṭṭārakasatyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjaga
dēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigata
pancamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ
śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara pādapaṁkaja
bhramaraṁ śrīgōpālarasar kaṇnavoḷḷiyaṁ du
ṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanadi sukhadināḷutta
mire poṭṭaḷakaṟeya nelevīḍinoḷ sakavarṣada
962 neya vikrama samvatsarada māgha bahuḷa
9 bṛhaspativāradandu kaṇnavaḷḷiya bhōgēśvarada
vāmasakti paṇḍitargge trikāḷabhōgamumaṁ pūjege
naḍeyisi koṭṭa piriya kōla matta
mēsvarada kēriyumaṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyi
pparācāryya
da pramukhakaraṇaṁgaḷ dharmmasāsanadi pra
varinti sāsanada vyavasteyeṁtende
bāṇarāsi kurukṣētra Argghyatīrttha
prayāgeyaḷ sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsi
rvvatapōdhanarumanaḻida paṁcamahāpātakanakku
yasya yasya yadābhūmi tasyatasyata
Digital edition of SII 20.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
